definitions.text: An account of real or fictional events.
examples: The book tells the story of two roommates.
You’ve been telling stories again, haven’t you?
What will she do without being able to watch her stories?

definitions.text: To tell as a story; to relate or narrate about.
To post a story (chronological collection of pictures or short videos) on an application or website.
Used as a greeting, short for what's the story?

examples: Our shop was on the fourth story of the building, so we had to install an elevator.
